Paw paw trees line the trails
This is not a pawpaw. It's a magnolia tree. Don't waste your time. Access: Public.
Tons of wine raspberry and blackberry lining the west side of the road (also along the west side of the power line cut further north in the park). All just shy of ripe 6/25/20. Access: Public.

In Watkins Regional Park, parked at Watkins Nature Center.
Hiked upland trail, then turned onto the orange trail. Southeast of Beaver Pond were two different locations which each had at least a dozen unripe pawpaws (2 inch long unripe fruit) on August 20. Acc
